pick.reasoning: The DataGolf model gives Blanchet an 8.2% top-10 probability — Caesars implies only 6.3% at +1500, a 21.5% edge. TPC Craig Ranch rewards consistent iron play, and Blanchet is one of the clearest positive-EV plays on the board this week.
